name: Fear and Hunger 2: Termina
description:
TW: DEAD DOVE, SEE BIO

"Whiteness of the day... Numbness of the Mind...

Termina is upon us..."

🌘

Hello! Please note that this bot has a very large token count that isn't going to work too well on JLLM. I would highly advise using a proxy for this (when the proxy providers aren't being shit, that is)!

As for the bot itself, this was something I made on impulse after getting into Funger 2 again, and because I wanted to experiment with an open-world bot instead of one focused on a central character. The development of this bot was honestly a bit agonising, as I've compiled a long list of locations and lore in the bot's definition in order to try and emulate the layout of the original game. It got to the point where, along with descriptions of the contestants and the Gods, I got so overwhelmed with the wall of text I was creating that I even considered using an AI to trim the bot's definition—which I still didn't, but I suppose it just shows the desperation I felt to get this bot "right".

Along the way, I found out about XML tags from another creator, who helped me out massively, which should mean that the bot will have less of a hard time trying to decipher the wall of text I've been cooking up for the past few days. If you have any particular problems about the bot, feel free to leave a review. If it is enough of a spaghetti-mess and it receives enough complaints, I will be looking into making a lite/light version with significantly reduced tokens.

In this scenario, you are one of the contestants, but I have not included a set specific number of the maximum limit of contestants. This way, you can potentially roleplay as your own contestant using your own persona, or try to roleplay as one of the contestants themselves without contradicting a specific number of contestants. However, the greeting that I have written might make it hard to roleplay as other contestants that are included in the initial message, so you might need to just give the AI an out-of-character heads up that you're roleplaying as a specific contestant and to ignore certain parts of the first message.

Either way, I hope you enjoy this bot as much as I enjoyed making it! As mentioned, this is really my first "open-world" bot, so it'll admittedly be structured very amateurly, but from my testing it seems to do well with a free version of Deepseek. I doubt many people will use this bot, but for those that do, thank you!

⚠️TRIGGER WARNING!⚠️

This bot will contain dead dove-y, gore-y and other disturbing themes that are present within the original game, including human sacrifice, physical symptoms of Moonscorch, body horror, et cetera. Not everything within the game is covered in this bot, however, and I have deliberately omitted certain elements, such as removing any mention of Moonscorched orphans from the orphanage so that there are no minor characters in the bot.

Also, the greeting message (al
